summary: Dashboard Overview (RBAC STEP 3) Testing Complete - 14/14 backend tests PASSED, Frontend fully functional. Dashboard shows all 5 KPI sections (Utenti, Leghe, Giornate, Pagamenti, Attivita Recente). Mobile hamburger menu works correctly. All design requirements met.

frontend_tests.dashboard_first_page: PASS - Dashboard is the first/active page after login
frontend_tests.kpi_users_card: PASS - Shows Attivi (73), Disabilitati (0), Nuovi 7gg (4), Login 24h (2)
frontend_tests.kpi_leagues_card: PASS - Shows Totale (58), A Rischio (8 with red highlight)
frontend_tests.kpi_matchdays_card: PASS - Shows Bozza/Open/Locked/Live/Completate with colored borders
frontend_tests.kpi_payments_card: PASS - Shows Pending (12) and recent payments table
frontend_tests.kpi_audit_card: PASS - Shows Attivita Recente with audit entries
frontend_tests.at_risk_gestisci_btn: PASS - Gestisci button navigates to Leagues page
frontend_tests.sidebar_panoramica: PASS - Shows PANORAMICA section with Dashboard first
frontend_tests.mobile_hamburger_visible: PASS - Hamburger button visible at mobile viewport
frontend_tests.mobile_sidebar_toggle: PASS - Sidebar opens/closes on hamburger click

verified_features: dashboard-stats users section has total, disabled, deleted, new_7d, recent_logins_24h
dashboard-stats leagues section has total and at_risk array with name and reason
dashboard-stats matchdays section has count per status (DRAFT/OPEN/LOCKED/LIVE/COMPLETED)
dashboard-stats payments section has recent (max 10) and pending_count
dashboard-stats audit section has latest 20 entries sorted by date descending
Dashboard is first page after login (shown under PANORAMICA in sidebar)
All 5 KPI cards rendered: Utenti, Leghe, Giornate, Pagamenti, Attivita Recente
At-risk leagues show with red counter and Gestisci button linking to leagues page
Matchday Open has blue border (#3B82F6), Live has green border (#10B981)
Mobile responsive with hamburger menu at max-width:768px
critical_code_review_comments: dashboard-stats endpoint uses datetime.now(timezone.utc) correctly for time calculations
At-risk leagues detection works for both 'no owner' and 'no admin' cases
Mobile CSS properly hides sidebar and shows hamburger at 768px breakpoint
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC STEP 3 Dashboard Overview complete. All 5 KPI sections working: Utenti (active/disabled/new 7d/login 24h), Leghe (total/at-risk with Gestisci), Giornate (per status with colored borders), Pagamenti (pending + recent 10), Audit (latest 20). Mobile hamburger menu functional. Dashboard is first page after login under PANORAMICA section.
